name: Steer mode vision handling
summary: Steer mode now matches normal mode for vision model incompatibility warnings and state clearing.
detail: Ensures consistent UX across modes when images are dropped due to model incompatibility. Uses showWarning(), resets clipboardImageSeq, and updates attachment bar.
content: Ensures consistent UX across modes when images are dropped due to model incompatibility. Uses showWarning(), resets clipboardImageSeq, and updates attachment bar.

facetData.trigger: when vision model doesn't support images
facetData.behavior: show warning, drop images, clear state (same as normal mode)
